content: agent1: implementing feat(types) ssn type in outlines/types/__init__.py, adding after the isbn type definition. Should be a small isolated addition. Let me know if you're touching the same file.

agent1: I don't see hash_sha256 in my copy of outlines/types/__init__.py — looks like we each have isolated repo copies (separate patch.txt submissions), so no real clobbering risk. I've already added ssn = Regex(r'\d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4}') right after isbn in my copy and verified it. Going with that unless you tell me otherwise.
